## Summary
- what changed
- why it changed

## Risk
- [ ] Tier 0 logic affected
- [ ] payment behavior affected
- [ ] auth or permissions affected
- [ ] schema or event contract affected
- [ ] public web or landing page affected

## Verification
- [ ] `pnpm lint`
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck`
- [ ] `pnpm test:coverage`
- [ ] `pnpm check:critical-coverage`
- [ ] docs updated if behavior changed

## Rollout Notes
- staging verification required:
- production verification required:
- rollback target:
